result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 9:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT fc.*
  FROM filtered_cases fc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = fc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    nt.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred nt
  WHERE nt.owner_id IS NOT NULL
), case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases an agent was involved with either as initial owner or via any owner assignment event
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ht.owner_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times ht
  GROUP BY ht.owner_id
)
SELECT a.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN case_counts_all cc ON cc.owner_id = a.owner_id
WHERE cc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT fc.*
  FROM filtered_cases fc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = fc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    nt.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred nt
  WHERE nt.owner_id IS NOT NULL
), case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases an agent was involved with either as initial owner or via any owner assignment event
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ht.owner_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times ht
  GROUP BY ht.owner_id
)
SELECT a.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN case_counts_all cc ON cc.owner_id = a.owner_id
WHERE cc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT fc.*
  FROM filtered_cases fc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = fc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    nt.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred nt
  WHERE nt.owner_id IS NOT NULL
), case_counts_all AS (
  -- count cases an agent was involved with either as initial owner or via any owner assignment event
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ht.owner_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times ht
  GROUP BY ht.owner_id
)
SELECT a.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN case_counts_all cc ON cc.owner_id = a.owner_id
WHERE cc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months') AS start_ts
), filtered_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred AS (
  SELECT fc.*
  FROM filtered_cases fc
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = fc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT
    nt.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closed_ts - nt.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred nt
  WHERE nt.owner_id IS NOT NULL
), case_counts_all AS (
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c, params p
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    CROSS JOIN params p
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
  ) x
  WHERE owner_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY owner_id
), avg_handle AS (
  SELECT
    ht.owner_id,
    AVG(ht.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times ht
  GROUP BY ht.owner_id
)
SELECT a.owner_id AS agent_id
FROM avg_handle a
JOIN case_counts_all cc ON cc.owner_id = a.owner_id
WHERE cc.cases_involved > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c, params p

  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events

    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closed_ts - nt.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds

  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_involved
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c, params p
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts

    UNION

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    CROSS JOIN params p

    ht.owner_id,

LIMIT 1;
